---
title: "R Notebook"
output: html_notebook
---

This is an [R Markdown](http://rmarkdown.rstudio.com) Notebook. When you execute code within the notebook, the results appear beneath the code. 

Try executing this chunk by clicking the *Run* button within the chunk or by placing your cursor inside it and pressing *Cmd+Shift+Enter*. 

```{r}
# ===== 0) Packages =====
library(tidyverse)
library(survival)
library(survminer)
library(stringr)
library(broom)
library(rlang)
```


```{r}
# ===== 1) Load data =====
clin_pt  <- read.delim("data_clinical_patient.txt",  skip = 4, check.names = FALSE)
clin_smp <- read.delim("data_clinical_sample.txt",   skip = 4, check.names = FALSE)
cnv_raw  <- read.delim("all_cnv_table.txt",          check.names = FALSE, quote = "\"") %>%
  tibble::rownames_to_column("SAMPLE_ID")

clin_smp$SAMPLE_ID <- as.character(clin_smp$SAMPLE_ID)
clin_smp$PATIENT_ID <- as.character(clin_smp$PATIENT_ID)
cnv_raw$SAMPLE_ID  <- as.character(cnv_raw$SAMPLE_ID)
```

```{r}
# ===== 2) CNV calls (В±0.3) =====
cytoband_cols <- grep("^[0-9XY]+[pq]", names(cnv_raw), value = TRUE)
arm_cols      <- grep("^Arm",          names(cnv_raw), value = TRUE)

cnv_cat <- cnv_raw %>%
  mutate(across(all_of(c(cytoband_cols, arm_cols)), ~ case_when(
    .x >  0.3 ~ "Gain",
    .x < -0.3 ~ "Loss",
    TRUE      ~ "None"
  )))
```

```{r}
# ===== 3) Keep TMB from sample file and carry it through the merge =====
stopifnot("TMB_NONSYNONYMOUS" %in% names(clin_smp))
clin_smp <- clin_smp %>%
  mutate(
    SAMPLE_ID = as.character(SAMPLE_ID),
    PATIENT_ID = as.character(PATIENT_ID),
    TMB = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(TMB_NONSYNONYMOUS))
  )


# -- include TMB in the sample_info we join to CNV
sample_info <- clin_smp %>%
  select(SAMPLE_ID, PATIENT_ID, CANCER_TYPE, ONCOTREE_CODE, SAMPLE_TYPE, TMB)

merged_sample <- sample_info %>% left_join(cnv_cat, by = "SAMPLE_ID")
```

```{r}
# ===== 4) analysis frame (one row per sample), OS, standardized TMB =====
safe_scale <- function(x) if (all(is.na(x))) rep(NA_real_, length(x)) else as.numeric(scale(x))

df <- clin_pt %>%
  mutate(PATIENT_ID = as.character(PATIENT_ID)) %>%
  select(PATIENT_ID, OS_MONTHS, OS_STATUS, SEX, DRUG_TYPE) %>%
  left_join(merged_sample, by = "PATIENT_ID") %>%
  mutate(
    OS    = if_else(grepl("LIVING", OS_STATUS), 0, 1),
    TMB_z = safe_scale(TMB)
  )

df <- df %>%
  mutate(OS = if_else(str_detect(OS_STATUS, "LIVING"), 0, 1)) %>%
  mutate(TMB_z = as.numeric(scale(TMB)))

# quick sanity (optional)
length(unique(df$PATIENT_ID))
sum(!is.na(df$TMB))
```

```{r}
# ===== 4) Build analysis frame (one row per sample), create OS and TMB_z =====
df <- clin_pt %>%
  mutate(PATIENT_ID = as.character(PATIENT_ID)) %>%
  select(PATIENT_ID, OS_MONTHS, OS_STATUS, SEX, DRUG_TYPE) %>%
  left_join(merged_sample, by = "PATIENT_ID") %>%
  mutate(
    OS    = if_else(grepl("LIVING", OS_STATUS), 0, 1),
    TMB_z = as.numeric(scale(TMB))
  )

# quick sanity
length(unique(df$PATIENT_ID))
sum(!is.na(df$TMB))
```

```{r}
# ===== 5) Cox: tumor Г— cytoband Г— (Gain/Loss), adjusted for TMB =====
# ===== TMB-adjusted cytoband Cox results (one row per cancer Г— band Г— Gain/Loss) =====
library(tidyverse)
library(survival)
library(broom)
library(stringr)

dir.create("out", showWarnings = FALSE)

# cytoband columns present in df
cytoband_cols <- grep("^[0-9XY]+[pq]", names(df), value = TRUE)

# result schema (pre-allocate so writing empty won't error)
res_cyto_tmb <- tibble(
  CANCER_TYPE = character(),
  Cytoband    = character(),
  Comparison  = character(),
  N           = integer(),
  HR_CNV      = double(),
  LCL_CNV     = double(),
  UCL_CNV     = double(),
  P_CNV       = double(),
  log2HR      = double(),
  # optional: TMB coefficient (per SD) when model includes TMB
  HR_TMB_SD   = double(),
  LCL_TMB_SD  = double(),
  UCL_TMB_SD  = double(),
  P_TMB       = double()
)

for (tumor in sort(unique(df$CANCER_TYPE))) {
  d_tumor <- df %>% filter(CANCER_TYPE == tumor, DRUG_TYPE == "PD-1/PDL-1")
  if (nrow(d_tumor) == 0) next
  
  for (band in cytoband_cols) {
    for (comparison in c("Gain","Loss")) {
      
      dat <- d_tumor %>%
        filter(!is.na(OS_MONTHS), !is.na(OS),
               !!sym(band) %in% c("None", comparison)) %>%
        mutate(
          CNV   = factor(!!sym(band), levels = c("None", comparison)),
          TMB_z = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(scale(TMB)))
        )
      
      if (nrow(dat) < 10 || n_distinct(dat$CNV) < 2) next
      
      # include TMB only if there's at least some non-NA variance
      use_tmb <- any(!is.na(dat$TMB_z)) && sd(dat$TMB_z, na.rm = TRUE) > 0
      fml <- if (use_tmb) Surv(OS_MONTHS, OS) ~ CNV + TMB_z else Surv(OS_MONTHS, OS) ~ CNV
      
      fit <- try(coxph(fml, data = dat, ties = "efron"), silent = TRUE)
      if (inherits(fit, "try-error")) next
      
      td <- tidy(fit, exponentiate = TRUE, conf.int = TRUE)
      row_cnv <- td %>% filter(grepl("^CNV", term)) %>% slice(1)
      row_tmb <- if (use_tmb) td %>% filter(term == "TMB_z") %>% slice(1) else tibble()
      
      res_cyto_tmb <- add_row(
        res_cyto_tmb,
        CANCER_TYPE = tumor,
        Cytoband    = band,
        Comparison  = comparison,
        N           = nrow(dat),
        HR_CNV      = if (nrow(row_cnv)) row_cnv$estimate else NA_real_,
        LCL_CNV     = if (nrow(row_cnv)) row_cnv$conf.low else NA_real_,
        UCL_CNV     = if (nrow(row_cnv)) row_cnv$conf.high else NA_real_,
        P_CNV       = if (nrow(row_cnv)) row_cnv$p.value else NA_real_,
        log2HR      = if (nrow(row_cnv) && is.finite(row_cnv$estimate)) log2(row_cnv$estimate) else NA_real_,
        HR_TMB_SD   = if (nrow(row_tmb)) row_tmb$estimate else NA_real_,
        LCL_TMB_SD  = if (nrow(row_tmb)) row_tmb$conf.low else NA_real_,
        UCL_TMB_SD  = if (nrow(row_tmb)) row_tmb$conf.high else NA_real_,
        P_TMB       = if (nrow(row_tmb)) row_tmb$p.value else NA_real_
      )
    }
  }
}

# signed -log10(p) for CNV (TMB-adjusted when TMB was included)
if (nrow(res_cyto_tmb) > 0) {
  res_cyto_tmb <- res_cyto_tmb %>%
    mutate(
      sign_dir  = case_when(is.na(log2HR) ~ NA_real_, log2HR > 0 ~ 1, TRUE ~ -1),
      sign_logP = ifelse(is.finite(P_CNV),
                         -log10(pmax(P_CNV, .Machine$double.xmin)) * sign_dir,
                         NA_real_)
    )
}

# write CSV
write_csv(res_cyto_tmb, "All_CancerTypes_Cytoband_SurvivalResults_TMBadj.csv")

# quick peek
res_cyto_tmb %>% slice_head(n = 10)
```


```{r}
# в”Ђв”Ђ TMB-adjusted area plots в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
library(tidyverse)
library(ggplot2)
library(gtools)
library(stringr)

# 1) Load the TMB-adjusted results
tmb <- readr::read_csv("All_CancerTypes_Cytoband_SurvivalResults_TMBadj.csv",
                       show_col_types = FALSE)

# 2) Normalize columns so plotting code works the same as before
tmb <- tmb %>%
  mutate(
    # if Event isn't present, create it from Comparison
    Event = if ("Event" %in% names(.)) Event else Comparison,
    # if sign_logP is missing, compute from P_CNV and log2HR (direction)
    sign_logP = if ("sign_logP" %in% names(.) && any(!is.na(sign_logP))) sign_logP else {
      dir <- case_when(is.na(log2HR) ~ NA_real_, log2HR > 0 ~ 1, TRUE ~ -1)
      -log10(pmax(P_CNV, .Machine$double.xmin)) * dir
    }
  ) %>%
  # keep rows we can draw
  filter(!is.na(CANCER_TYPE), !is.na(Cytoband), !is.na(Event), is.finite(sign_logP))

# quick sanity: do we have both Gain/Loss per tumour?
tmb %>%
  count(CANCER_TYPE, Event) %>%
  arrange(CANCER_TYPE, Event) %>%
  print(n = 100)

# 3) Make sure an output directory exists
out_dir <- "HR_area_plots_TMBadj"
if (!dir.exists(out_dir)) dir.create(out_dir)

# 4) Helper to build one tumour's area plot
plot_cnv_area_tmb <- function(df, tumour, signif_cut = 1.3) {
  chr_levels <- c(as.character(1:22), "X", "Y")
  
  pd <- df %>%
    filter(CANCER_TYPE == tumour) %>%
    mutate(
      Arm        = str_extract(Cytoband, "^[0-9XY]+[pq]"),
      Chromosome = str_extract(Arm, "^[0-9XY]+"),
      Chromosome = factor(Chromosome, levels = chr_levels)
    ) %>%
    arrange(Chromosome, Cytoband) %>%
    mutate(
      Cytoband = factor(Cytoband, levels = mixedsort(unique(Cytoband))),
      idx      = row_number()
    )
  
  if (nrow(pd) == 0) return(NULL)

  # guides
  centromere_idx <- pd %>%
    filter(str_detect(Arm, "q")) %>%
    group_by(Chromosome) %>%
    slice_head(n = 1) %>%
    pull(idx)

  chr_last_idx <- pd %>%
    group_by(Chromosome) %>%
    slice_tail(n = 1) %>%
    pull(idx)

  chr_mid_idx <- pd %>%
    group_by(Chromosome) %>%
    summarise(idx = floor(mean(range(idx))), .groups = "drop")

  ggplot(pd, aes(idx, sign_logP, fill = Event)) +
    geom_area(position = "identity", alpha = 0.75) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linewidth = .25) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = c(-signif_cut, signif_cut),
               colour = "grey40", linetype = "dotted", linewidth = .25) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = chr_last_idx + 0.5, colour = "black", linewidth = .3) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = centromere_idx, colour = "grey30",
               linetype = "dashed", linewidth = .25) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c(Gain = "#D64045", Loss = "#375E97")) +
    scale_x_continuous(breaks = chr_mid_idx$idx,
                       labels = chr_mid_idx$Chromosome,
                       expand = c(0, 0)) +
    labs(title = paste("Signed -log10(p) CNV Survival (TMB-adj) вЂ“", tumour),
         x = "chromosome",
         y = "signed -log(p)",
         fill = "Event") +
    theme_bw() +
    theme(panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
          panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
          axis.text.x      = element_text(size = 6),
          plot.title       = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12))
}

# 5) Loop and save one PDF per tumour
unique(tmb$CANCER_TYPE) %>%
  sort() %>%
  purrr::walk(function(tumour) {
    p <- plot_cnv_area_tmb(tmb, tumour)
    if (!is.null(p)) {
      fname <- gsub("[ /]", "_", tumour)
      ggsave(file.path(out_dir, paste0(fname, "_HR_area_TMBadj.pdf")),
             p, width = 10, height = 5, useDingbats = FALSE)
    }
  })
```


```{r}
# ===== Compare non-adjusted vs TMB-adjusted cytoband results (robust) =====
library(tidyverse)

alpha <- 0.10  # significance threshold

nonadj_path <- "All_CancerTypes_Cytoband_SurvivalResults.csv"
tmbadj_path <- "All_CancerTypes_Cytoband_SurvivalResults_TMBadj.csv"

nonadj <- readr::read_csv(nonadj_path, show_col_types = FALSE)
tmbadj <- readr::read_csv(tmbadj_path, show_col_types = FALSE)

# helper: pick first available column name from candidates
pick_first <- function(df, candidates) {
  nm <- intersect(candidates, names(df))
  if (length(nm)) nm[1] else NA_character_
}

# --- figure out columns (allow multiple naming variants) ---
# keys
stopifnot("CANCER_TYPE" %in% names(nonadj), "CANCER_TYPE" %in% names(tmbadj))
stopifnot("Cytoband"    %in% names(nonadj), "Cytoband"    %in% names(tmbadj))

evt_non_col <- pick_first(nonadj, c("Event","Comparison"))
evt_tmb_col <- pick_first(tmbadj, c("Event","Comparison"))
stopifnot(!is.na(evt_non_col), !is.na(evt_tmb_col))  # must have an event column

# p-values
p_non_col  <- pick_first(nonadj, c("P_CNV","Raw_P_Cox","P","p","p.value"))
p_tmb_col  <- pick_first(tmbadj, c("P_CNV","Raw_P_Cox","P","p","p.value"))

# HRs
hr_non_col <- pick_first(nonadj, c("HR_CNV","HR","estimate","HazardRatio"))
hr_tmb_col <- pick_first(tmbadj, c("HR_CNV","HR","estimate","HazardRatio"))

# log2(HR)
log2_non_col <- pick_first(nonadj, c("log2HR","logHR","log2_HR"))
log2_tmb_col <- pick_first(tmbadj, c("log2HR","logHR","log2_HR"))

# --- normalize both tables to a common schema ---
normify <- function(df, evt_col, p_col, hr_col, log2_col) {
  out <- tibble(
    CANCER_TYPE = df$CANCER_TYPE,
    Cytoband    = as.character(df$Cytoband),
    Event       = df[[evt_col]],
    P           = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(df[[p_col]])),
    HR          = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(df[[hr_col]]))
  )
  # log2HR: prefer provided; else compute from HR if > 0
  if (!is.na(log2_col) && log2_col %in% names(df)) {
    out$log2HR <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(df[[log2_col]]))
  } else {
    out$log2HR <- ifelse(is.finite(out$HR) & out$HR > 0, log2(out$HR), NA_real_)
  }
  out
}

non_norm <- normify(nonadj, evt_non_col, p_non_col, hr_non_col, log2_non_col)
tmb_norm <- normify(tmbadj, evt_tmb_col, p_tmb_col, hr_tmb_col, log2_tmb_col)

# --- full outer join and classify ---
cmp <- full_join(
  non_norm %>% rename(P_non = P, HR_non = HR, log2HR_non = log2HR),
  tmb_norm %>% rename(P_tmb = P, HR_tmb = HR, log2HR_tmb = log2HR),
  by = c("CANCER_TYPE","Cytoband","Event")
) %>%
  mutate(
    sig_non = !is.na(P_non) & P_non < alpha,
    sig_tmb = !is.na(P_tmb) & P_tmb < alpha,
    dir_non = case_when(is.finite(log2HR_non) & log2HR_non >  0 ~ "Riskв†‘",
                        is.finite(log2HR_non) & log2HR_non <  0 ~ "Riskв†“",
                        TRUE ~ NA_character_),
    dir_tmb = case_when(is.finite(log2HR_tmb) & log2HR_tmb >  0 ~ "Riskв†‘",
                        is.finite(log2HR_tmb) & log2HR_tmb <  0 ~ "Riskв†“",
                        TRUE ~ NA_character_),
    status = case_when(
      sig_non &  sig_tmb ~ "Retained (sig in both)",
      sig_non & !sig_tmb ~ "Lost after TMB adj",
     !sig_non &  sig_tmb ~ "New after TMB adj",
      TRUE               ~ "NS in both"
    ),
    direction_changed = sig_non & sig_tmb & !is.na(dir_non) & !is.na(dir_tmb) & dir_non != dir_tmb
  ) %>%
  arrange(CANCER_TYPE, Cytoband, Event)

# write outputs
readr::write_csv(cmp, "CNV_TMBadj_comparison_by_event.csv")

summary_by_tumor <- cmp %>%
  group_by(CANCER_TYPE) %>%
  summarise(
    n_retained = sum(status == "Retained (sig in both)"),
    n_lost     = sum(status == "Lost after TMB adj"),
    n_new      = sum(status == "New after TMB adj"),
    n_ns_both  = sum(status == "NS in both"),
    n_flip_dir = sum(direction_changed),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(n_lost + n_new + n_flip_dir))

readr::write_csv(summary_by_tumor, "CNV_TMBadj_summary_by_tumor.csv")

# quick previews
print(summary_by_tumor, n = Inf)

top_changes <- cmp %>%
  filter(status %in% c("Lost after TMB adj","New after TMB adj") | direction_changed) %>%
  select(CANCER_TYPE, Cytoband, Event,
         status, direction_changed,
         P_non, HR_non, dir_non,
         P_tmb, HR_tmb, dir_tmb) %>%
  arrange(CANCER_TYPE, status, P_non, P_tmb)

print(top_changes, n = 50)
```

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(readr)

# === Load both results ===
naive <- read_csv("All_CancerTypes_Cytoband_SurvivalResults.csv")
tmb   <- read_csv("All_CancerTypes_Cytoband_SurvivalResults_TMBadj.csv")

# Harmonize key columns
naive <- naive %>%
  transmute(CANCER_TYPE, Cytoband, Comparison, HR = HR, P = Raw_P_Cox)

tmb <- tmb %>%
  transmute(CANCER_TYPE, Cytoband, Comparison, HR = HR_CNV, P = P_CNV)

# Merge
merged <- full_join(naive, tmb,
                    by = c("CANCER_TYPE","Cytoband","Comparison"),
                    suffix = c("_naive","_tmb"))

# Decide significance (p < 0.1, adjust threshold if needed)
merged <- merged %>%
  mutate(sig_naive = !is.na(P_naive) & P_naive < 0.1,
         sig_tmb   = !is.na(P_tmb)   & P_tmb   < 0.1)

# Keep only cases where significance differs
diff_hits <- merged %>%
  filter(sig_naive != sig_tmb)

# Print and save
print(diff_hits, n = Inf)
write_csv(diff_hits, "SignificanceDifferences_TMBvsNaive.csv")
```
